title: Control storage
excerpt: We need the ability to delete the old files, lets say any files older than xxx should be deleted automatically

posts.author: Adham (Adham)
posts.cookedHtml: We need the ability to delete the old files, lets say any files older than xxx should be deleted automatically

posts.author: kilomray (Kilomray)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Adham I think Storage Saver app can help here. It can automatically offload files from items that haven’t been updated in a while.
